programmes.show_description: Benson investigates allegations against a popular radio personality. Rollins goes undercover when a shocking confession leads to another crime.
The investigation into a sex-for-housing scheme expands, putting Benson's loyalty to Garland to the test. Rollins and Carisi attempt to keep their witnesses on board.
Chief McGrath leans on Garland and Benson to produce results, and the search for a missing witness leads Fin and Kat down a dangerous path.
Root goes undercover at a radio station to protect the host of a conspiracy theory show who stumbles upon information that could get him killed.
Reese and Finch become trapped in a hospital that becomes ground zero for a deadly viral outbreak. Samaritan's latest recruit has second thoughts.
A personalised keychain casts doubt on a man's story. A cyclist tosses something as soon as deputies arrive. A laid-back driver underestimates what is in his car by a few bin bags.
Shop by phone from the comfort of your home.
Ideal World Shopping - For All Your Shopping Needs
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Crime drama series. The NCIS team races against time to thwart a terrorist plot to unleash a dirty bomb on DC.
Jack-Knife. After a driver from a shady shipping company is found dead, the NCIS team take to the road to bring down the illegal operation.
Crime drama series. Gibbs is forced to revisit his past when his former mother-in-law turns out to be a witness in a murder investigation.
When a body is found outside the Chinese Consul, Briscoe and Green suspect political suicide. Only when murder is suspected does the case get complicated.
An investigation into the murder of a wealthy teenage girl leads the detectives to an abandoned car and a second body.
When one half of a two-man gambling corporation turns up dead, Briscoe and Green go after his partner.
Smoke: Powerful American drama series about cops and lawyers. Briscoe and Green investigate the death of a child who fell out of a high-rise window.
Bodies: Powerful American drama series about cops and lawyers. While investigating the death of a teenager, the detectives think they have stumbled onto the work of a serial killer.
When a notorious bounty hunter is found dead in a seedy motel room, Briscoe and Green piece together his last movements, which include a meeting with an up-and-coming journalist.
Dead Air: US crime drama series. The team investigates the death of a radio DJ and a naval officer who were both killed live on air.
Cracked: US crime drama series. The team worries about Abby when she becomes too involved with solving the murder of a naval scientist. Meanwhile, Tony's newest fling brings trouble.
Broken Arrow: US crime drama series. The team is surprised when Gibbs asks Tony's father to join them in a murder investigation.
Prentiss and J.J. are faced with important decisions to make about their futures as the BAU travels to Texas to investigate a series of murdered businessmen.
Carisi's niece helps a friend to report a sexual assault. Benson investigates a college's secret society that preys on female students.
The creator of a dating app is accused of using it to rape women. Velasco's experience as an SVU detective is put on trial.
Benson and Rollins must contend with the FBI and the Organized Crime bureau when a rape victim identifies a dangerous mobster as her assailant.
The SVU searches for a serial rapist who preys on mothers with young children. Benson and Fin struggle under the tightened reins of Chief McGrath.
NCIS has to find out the truth behind a tell-all book that threatens a decorated Marine's life before it is published.
When the dean of a swanky prep school is murdered, Shaw and Riley must dig into the toxic system of pressure on the students to succeed. Brady's son asks for a favour.
An alleged burglar claims his sack full of money is a gift from his grandma. The discovery of a pink bandana leads deputies to question a suspect's story.
Shop by phone from the comfort of your home.
Ideal World Shopping - For All Your Shopping Needs
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Double Identity: Crime drama series involving Navy and Marine Corps personnel. The NCIS team make a surprising discovery while investigating the shooting of a Marine.
Jurisdiction: The NCIS team works with the Coast Guard Investigative Service when a Navy diver seeking sunken treasure is murdered.
Guilty Pleasure: Crime drama series following the US navy's dedicated federal agency. The team asks Holly Snow for help after the death of a navy officer is linked to a call girl.
The team experience mixed feelings when they find themselves prosecuting a priest for the murder of an evil drug dealer.
When a jewellery store is robbed, the team immediately set about tracking down a civic-minded witness.
Briscoe and Green think they have found the murderer of a car salesman who was bludgeoned to death, but there is more to the killing than meets the eye.
Patient Zero: Drama series about cops and lawyers. Detectives are puzzled when they discover the victim of a lethal carjacking was carrying a vial of the SARS virus.
Shrunk: Powerful American drama series about cops and lawyers. An aspiring actress is found stabbed to death in the apartment of a famous songwriter.
Blaze: Police drama series. Cops investigate a blaze at an overcrowded gig in which 23 people died. Briscoe and Green suspect the band's lead singer is responsible.
Enemies Foreign: US crime drama series. The team has to protect Ziva's father when he attends the NCIS conference. Ziva confronts her past.
Enemies Domestic: US crime drama series. After an ambush changes the course of their investigation, the NCIS team has to find answers quickly.
False Witness: US crime drama. This week, the team search for a key witness in a murder trial who has been scared off giving evidence after receiving a threat at the safe house.
Danny and Baez investigate a man who preys on the elderly, while Erin is forced to admit her wrongdoings.
Henry and Danny clash over a case involving a volatile husband. Frank is caught in an ongoing battle between the NYPD and FDNY, and Erin considers a life-changing opportunity.
